verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the creation of the earth, God created man And having fellowship with Him was also in God's plan That we may live in the class of God's own being That we may see and hear the things that carnal mind can't comprehend

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Father God is mighty He's living in me And I'm made in His image I in Him and He in me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Just to know that I was in God's mind before the world And then by making a likeness unto God I've seen I know now who I am with much more understanding I realize it more and more each day This rock on which I'm living
